reasoning: All models approved the PKGBUILD's safety but failed to audit source files due to download failure. Critical risk assessment requires examining the binary artifacts which were never reviewed.
coverage_issues: All models failed to review source tarballs (critical for -bin packages) due to download failure
No analysis of actual binaries/scripts that would execute during installation
false_negatives: Potential risks in unexamined binaries (could contain malware, unexpected network/filesystem access)
Install-time behavior from un-reviewed .install scripts (if any)
learnings: Improve source download reliability checks before audit
Explicitly flag un-reviewed files due to download failures as high risk
Enhance models to emphasize missing file analysis in verdict reasoning
